query: double exposure photograph overlapping ghostly silhouette portrait
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / double_exposure: ghostly overlapping portraits, multi-exposure

response.objective_caption: A top-down view of a middle-aged man with gray hair and a mustache, dressed in a black zip-up jacket over a light blue turtleneck and blue jeans, standing with his hands in his pockets against a light gray backdrop. Two overlapping depictions of his face appear symmetrically at his shoulders, both looking upward toward the camera.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal double-exposure portrait shot from above, depicting a man in a black jacket and blue jeans standing with his hands in his pockets. Intentional double exposure overlays two ghosted images of the same face symmetrically at his shoulders, creating an impossible, dreamlike two-headed figure against a light gray background.
